headline: Stocks That Weathered Past Recessions: Expert Shares Picks That Withstood Every Downturn
summary: Stock market expert Jon Erlichman recently shared a review of stock returns during the last six U.S. recessions, highlighting those that have performed well in difficult times.

headline: Ackman Bets Big on Hertz as Tariff Tailwinds Boost Fleet Value: 'Investing Is Risky, There Are No Guarantees of a Successful Outcome'
summary: Bill Ackman's hedge fund Pershing Square Capital Management has acquired a significant stake in Hertz Global Holdings.

headline: Consumer Tech News (Apr 14-Apr 18): Trump's 125% China Tariff Sidesteps Consumer Tech, Tesla Model Y Spotted in India & More
summary: Trump excludes China-made tech products from tariffs, reducing scope of levies. Tesla's Musk and Meta's Zuckerberg voice clips hacked in California. Rivian boasts US-centric supply chain.

headline: Easter Candy Sticker Shock: Trump Tariffs And Climate Threaten to Make Your Chocolate Bunny A Luxury Item
summary: Chocolate lovers are in for a rude awakening this Easter, with their favorite bars, cherished brands, and even the iconic Cadbury Creme Egg are significantly dearer compared to prior years.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Netflix, UnitedHealth, Eli Lilly — And Market Volatility Continues
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Italy Joins US To Oppose 'Discriminatory' Digital Taxes On Big Tech Giants Like Apple, Amazon, Google, And Meta
summary: Italy and the U.S. have reached an agreement to challenge "discriminatory" digital taxes on major tech companies like Apple, Amazon, Google, and Meta, signaling a shift in Italy's stance on the controversial 3% levy targeting U.S. tech giants.

headline: Elon Musk's Tesla Delays Launch Of Affordable Model Y By Several Months: Report
summary: Tesla delays US launch of affordable Model Y SUV, with production target of 250K units by 2026. Performance models also planned.
